standard_chat.behavior: Replays all completed durable user/assistant text exchanges, then appends the current user message.
standard_chat.risk: Long chat sessions can grow without a hard budget even though the two-turn test was small.

specialist_to_supervisor.behavior: Domain-envelope outputs are reduced to concise supervisor-facing summaries when recognized.
specialist_to_supervisor.risk: Unrecognized structured outputs or plain large text can still be returned in full to the supervisor.

validator_agents.observed_payload_shape: DomainValidationRequest JSON as the user message to validator agents.
validator_agents.retry_or_continuation_risk: Validator model inputs grew from 4.1k chars to 31.5k chars in the live second-turn trace.
validator_agents.risk: Validation retries and continuation can re-send prior request JSON, reasoning summaries, tool calls, and tool outputs.

trace_review_langfuse.behavior: Stores rich model inputs, outputs, agent configs, extraction events, and internal tool outputs for forensic audit.
trace_review_langfuse.risk: Observability storage is intentionally verbose and should not be used as live model context unless explicitly summarized or paged.

agent_studio_chat_with_claude.behavior: Sends frontend-provided request.messages plus a context-sensitive system prompt to Anthropic. During a tool loop, appends assistant tool_use blocks plus full JSON tool_result messages to current_messages.
initial_call_context_risks: frontend request.messages are passed through server-side without a token budget
Agent Workshop prompt draft is included up to 12000 chars
Agent Workshop selected group prompt draft is included up to 6000 chars
selected agent base prompt or group rules can be injected into the system prompt
agent_studio_chat_with_claude.risk: Large TraceReview or domain-envelope tool results can accumulate inside one Agent Studio turn.

flows.runner_context: execute_flow passes one initial user prompt to run_agent_streamed.
flows.step_state: completed_steps stores full output internally and output_preview for SSE; output_key template variables store full result_text.
flows.hidden_replay: Completed flow turns persist a hidden assistant memory message with visible output capped at 2500 chars and hidden JSON capped at 18000 chars.
flows.bounded_hidden_flow_json_replayed_to_lat: A synthesized, bounded hidden flow-memory JSON message can be replayed as assistant text after flow turns.
flows.risk: Custom flow templates can inject full prior outputs into later steps; future chat after many flow turns can replay multiple hidden flow summaries.

batch_processing.batch_compatibility: Requires a PDF extraction step and file output or curation handoff exit.
batch_processing.session_id_caveat: document_prefix is document_id[:8], so using the full UUID would be safer for session/trace disambiguation even though execute_flow starts each document with one prompt.
batch_processing.risk: Cost scales per document and per flow step; no evidence of prior batch documents being injected into later document context.
